e.g., `backend-api`, `devops-ci`, `security-audit`

e.g., Backend, DevOps, Database, Security, Testing/QA, API Design, Data/ML

What should agents do better with this skill?

What checklists, standards, or workflows should the playbook include?

Links to similar playbooks, style guides, or docs you want to align with.

- [ ] No, requesting community contribution
